rationale.risk-routing: learned classifier decides which actions require human check-in; tiered allocation
rationale.hitl-workflow: approval cascade, hard constraints, plan-gate checkpoints — human control surface
rationale.oversight-explanation: explains check-in reasons; legible policy/agent-initiated summaries, hw observe commands
rationale.survey-input: 21-engineer survey of oversight concerns and check-in preferences
rationale.framework: reusable dynamic-autonomy architecture integratable into agent pipeline
rationale.built-system: working Python CLI prototype, source provided, evaluated
rationale.agentic: oversees AI-initiated multi-step coding agent at artifact granularity
rationale.steering: behavioral-guidance retrieval path shapes agent reasoning (input-side)
rationale.risk-security: is_security_sensitive feature retains governance; security concern 10/21
rationale.risk-quality: test-suite verification gate; catches subtle bugs; concern 13/21
